name: page_views
title: Page Views
description: First-party traffic log (object_analytics). One row per non-asset HTTP request: path/method/status/ip/user_agent/referrer/session/is_owner. append storage -- write-hot and log-shaped; the platform's heaviest write path, and the source for analytics rollups. Bounded by the daemon's retention pass (process_analytics_retention), NOT id-fold compaction (a pure event log has nothing to fold). Admin-read only. See plan/2026-07-21-... parity assessment.
